text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aaaargh! That's so... incredibly super frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh! My legs! What's with them? Why don't
they burn with fiery rage?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And after I finally had the chance to race you
again! If this was Princess Fighter, this is where
I'd... I'd go full force...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And magnificently pulverize my rival into bits!
Waaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Take a look around, Kawakami...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's applauding us, and it's because we all
ran with everything we had.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Kawakami. It's only because you
declared yourself my rival that I came to
understand the joy of competing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I can't make any promises, but would you race me
again, Princess?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Why, of course! I'd give anything for the
opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion!
Fiiiiinnne!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A and B
text_block_list.text: Fiiiiine Motiooon! Sniffle... Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Forge ahead, Fine.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'll be watching you intently all the way!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right! I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Pardon?
choice_data_list: You still have time, don't you?
You still have time, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...!
You're right.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As long as I'm with you... I can run to the very
ends of the Earth!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let's make the best memories we can until the
day we have to part!
